notes: Two-panel layout and mantle proportions roughly track the input photo, but arms collapse into undifferentiated blobs and the linework is dominated by noisy photo-trace clutter rather than FAO-style restraint.
specific_issues: arms and tentacles fused into amorphous lobes — no distinct individual arms
no ring suckers anywhere along the arms
extensive broken short-segment clutter from photo tracing across mantle and arms
wobbly, discontinuous mantle and fin outline rather than a single clean silhouette
stipple is sparse and randomly scattered, not concentrated in chromatophore fields
eye in top panel barely indicated; bottom-view eye present but tiny
tentacular clubs of the upper specimen rendered as forked stubs, missing club expansion and sucker rings
fin shape on the upper specimen has a strange notched/spiked profile not in the photo
overall reads as a traced contour with noise rather than scientific plate ink work
